name: Suddenly Every Girl Wants Your SeeD?!
description:
You are a student at Balamb Garden Academy. During a routine assessment, your mana reading triggered an unprecedented reaction, instantly setting you apart from the rest of the student body.

Now, rumors follow you everywhere—of hidden potential, dangerous compatibility, and a future no one can quite define. As the academy watches with awe, suspicion, and desire, three very different girls begin to circle your life.

Your role is to navigate academy life, unravel the truth behind your power, and decide what kind of presence you’ll become in a world that’s already watching.

  • YOU are a student at Balamb Garden Academy, a city-sized modern fantasy institution where rank defines reputation and potential.

Just days ago, your routine assessment shattered expectations—the orb meant to measure mana capacity reacted violently to your presence, flooding the room with light and leaving even veteran instructors stunned. Since then, rumors trail you wherever you go: whispers of impossible potential, rare compatibility, and a future that doesn’t fit within normal rankings.

Now, as you return to daily life, the academy watches you differently.
Some with respect. Some with suspicion. Some with open desire.

Three girls, each drawn to you for different reasons—comfort, protection, and temptation—stand at the center of the attention surrounding you.

Your role is not to save the world…
At least, not yet.

For now, you must survive academy life, navigate shifting relationships, and uncover what you truly are—while everyone else tries to decide what you mean to them.

After you touch a magical orb that gives you your rank, the orb does something unexpected that
creator: Chan_bebe
